name: example_feature
title: Add pull-to-refresh on feed
acceptanceCriteria: Feed data refreshes when user pulls down
Loading indicator shown during refresh
Items list updates after refresh completes

name: ios-build-strategy
title: iOS build strategy for large Tuist monorepos
acceptanceCriteria: resolve strategy validates dependencies without full compilation
tuist strategy runs tuist build for Tuist modules
auto strategy falls back from tuist to xcodebuild to resolve
xcodebuild strategy works for standalone non-Tuist modules
repository setup preserves GitHub origin and Tuist cache
mutation score for touched files is at least 80%

name: test-download-movements-providers
title: Add unit tests for movementsDataProvider and fileDataProvider
acceptanceCriteria: When getMovementsData succeeds, movementsDataProvider returns DownloadMovements data
When getMovementsData throws, movementsDataProvider returns null
When downloadMovements succeeds, fileDataProvider returns DownloadMovementsFileResponse
When downloadMovements throws, fileDataProvider propagates the error

name: fix-pyme-wall-movements-empty-page-state
title: Fix emptyPage state logic in PymeWallMovementsListNotifier
acceptanceCriteria: When loadFirstPage receives non-empty content, pageState is pageLoaded
When loadFirstPage receives empty content, pageState is emptyPage
When loadNextPage adds content to an existing list, pageState is pageLoaded
When loadNextPage returns empty and existing list is non-empty, pageState is pageLoaded
When repository throws, pageState is pageError
Mutation score for pyme_wall_movements_providers.dart is at least 80%

name: flutter-web-skill
title: Update Flutter Web skill for RPP multiplatform monorepos
acceptanceCriteria: Skill recognizes Melos + FVM 3.35.7 monorepo structure
Skill uses melos bootstrap before flutter pub get
Skill detects fluro-based routing and package exports
Skill flags mobile-only packages and respects Flutter Web constraints
Skill prompts use correct package layout (core/data/presentation)
Skill documents separate GitHub/Bitbucket credentials for dependencies

name: bre-b-presummary-success-error-states
title: Handle SummaryFormSuccess and SummaryFormError states in Bre-B presummary form
acceptanceCriteria: When the notifier emits SummaryFormSuccess, the module renders a success view with a primary action
When the notifier emits SummaryFormError, the module renders a GenericError with retry and back actions
Retrying from SummaryFormError reloads the presummary
The primary action on SummaryFormSuccess navigates to the summary route
Existing PresummaryFormLoading, PresummaryFormError and PresummaryFormSuccess states are unchanged
